creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #13)
> (In reply to Pedro F. Giffuni from comment #12)
> > (In reply to Vanilla I. Shu from comment #10)
> > > How about install pre-compiled binary?
> > 
> > I hate to admit it, since I thought it was preferable to rebuild such
> > things, but for this port it is a good idea.
> 
> So DragonFly users don't need / don't want this port?

I don't understand why not: Java bytecode is very portable and we have many other ports (beanshell, for example) that don't bother with sources.
